<!-- Source: HLD §3.2 LangGraph state machine, OAQ-6 fallback triggers, ADR-3. States are real graph nodes only. -->

# State Diagram — LangGraph Query State Machine

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Routing : query received
    Routing --> ConfidenceGate : RouterOutput produced
    Routing --> Fallback : doc.fallback_only == true (structural, OAQ-6)

    ConfidenceGate --> RouteOnlyDone : /v1/route (no generation)
    ConfidenceGate --> TargetedRetrieve : some section >= 0.5
    ConfidenceGate --> Fallback : all sections < 0.5 (query-time, FR-009)

    TargetedRetrieve --> Rerank : rerank == true
    TargetedRetrieve --> Generating : rerank == false
    Rerank --> Generating
    Fallback --> Generating : full-doc context

    Generating --> Streaming : SSE tokens
    Streaming --> Final : AnswerFinalEvent emitted
    Final --> [*]
    RouteOnlyDone --> [*]

    Generating --> Degraded : dependency down (503, NFR-013)
    Degraded --> [*]
```

> Two independent fallback triggers (structural `fallback_only` and query-time all-confidence-<0.5) both route to the Fallback state, per HLD OAQ-6.
